name: Xul
description: A Summoner who can push multiple lanes with ease.
title: Cryptic Necromancer
info: From the recesses of the eastern jungles comes a man cloaked in mystery. As a member of the secretive Priests of Rathma, or the Necromancers, Xul wields powerful death magic and fights to preserve the delicate balance between order and chaos.

Xul.name: Spectral Scythe
Xul.description: Summon a scythe that travels to Xul after 1 second, dealing 190 (+4% per level) damage to enemies and spawning a Skeletal Warrior when hitting enemy Heroes.  These do not count towards Xul's Raise Skeleton maximum.

Xul.name: Cursed Strikes
Xul.description: Xul's Basic Attacks deal damage in a wide area and reduce the Attack Speed of Heroes and Summons by 40% for 2 seconds. Lasts 4 seconds once triggered.

Xul.name: Bone Prison
Xul.description: After a 2 second delay, deal 80 (+4% per level) damage and Root the target enemy Hero for 1.75 seconds.  All nearby Skeletal Warriors will fixate on the target for their duration.

Xul.name: Skeletal Mages
Xul.description: Vector Targeting Summon 4 Frost Mages in a line that attack nearby enemies for 47 (+4% per level) damage a second and Slow them by 30% for 2 seconds. Last up to 15 seconds.

Xul.name: Poison Nova
Xul.description: After 0.5 seconds, release poisonous missiles that deal 630 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies hit over 10 seconds.

Xul.name: Raise Skeleton
Xul.description: When a nearby enemy Minion dies, it becomes a Skeletal Warrior with 240 (+4% per level) Health that attacks for 21 (+4% per level) damage and lasts up to 12 seconds. Upon death, Skeletal Warriors deal 40 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies.  Up to 3 Skeletal Warriors can be active at once when spawned in this way.

Xul.name: Bone Armor
Xul.description: Activate to gain a Shield equal to 25% of Xul's maximum Health for 3 seconds.

1.name: Backlash
1.description: When Bone Armor expires, nearby enemy Heroes take damage equal to 12% of their maximum Health.

1.name: Shackler
1.description: While Bone Armor is active, nearby enemies are Slowed by 35% for 1 second. Basic Attacks against Heroes that are Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed reduce the cooldown of Bone Armor by 2 seconds.

1.name: Shade
1.description: While Bone Armor is active, Xul evades all Basic Attacks, but increases the cooldown of Bone Armor by 10 seconds.

4.name: Reaper's Toll
4.description: Reduce the cooldown of Spectral Scythe by 2 seconds and its Mana cost by 15.

4.name: Grim Scythe
4.description: Increase Xul's Basic Attack damage by 15%.  Each enemy hit by Cursed Strikes reduces its cooldown by 1 second, up to 12 seconds.

4.name: Jailors
4.description: Bone Prison spawns 2 Skeletal Warriors.  These do not count towards Xul's Raise Skeleton maximum.  Quest: Spawn 80 Skeletal Warriors.  Reward: While fixating on an enemy, Skeletal Warriors gain 25% Movement and Attack Speed.

7.name: Harvest Vitality
7.description: Cursed Strikes heals for 70% of the damage dealt to Heroes.

7.name: Trag'Oul's Essence
7.description: Every time a Skeletal Warrior attacks an enemy, restore 0.5% of Xul's maximum Health and 0.2% of his maximum Mana.

7.name: Wall Of Bones
7.description: Increase the Shield amount of Bone Armor to 35% of Xul's maximum Health, and Xul gains 20 Spell Armor for its duration.

10.name: Poison Nova
10.description: After 0.5 seconds, release poisonous missiles that deal 630 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies hit over 10 seconds.

10.name: Skeletal Mages
10.description: Vector Targeting Summon 4 Frost Mages in a line that attack nearby enemies for 47 (+4% per level) damage a second and Slow them by 30% for 2 seconds. Last up to 15 seconds.

13.name: Echoes of Death
13.description: Spectral Scythe spawns 2 additional scythes next to the first after 1.5 seconds, dealing 40% damage.

13.name: Rapid Harvest
13.description: Gain 5% Attack Speed for 3 seconds each time Cursed Strikes hits an enemy, up to 75%.

13.name: Amplify Damage
13.description: Increase the Root duration of Bone Prison by 0.25 seconds.  Enemies Rooted by Bone Prison lose 25 Armor for 2 seconds.

16.name: Decrepify
16.description: Enemy Heroes that are damaged by Spectral Scythe or Skeletal Warriors are Slowed by 30% for 2.5 seconds.

16.name: Weaken
16.description: Enemy Heroes who are damaged by Cursed Strikes or Skeletal Warriors deal 35% less damage for 3 seconds.

16.name: Bone Spear
16.description: Deal 230 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in a line.

20.name: Andariel's Visage
20.description: Poison Nova heals for 50% of the damage dealt and its duration is increased by 50%.

20.name: Cold Hand of Death
20.description: Increase the Slow of Frost Mages by 20%.   Every 5th Spectral Scythe that hits enemy Heroes spawns a Frost Mage instead of a Skeletal Warrior at their location.

20.name: Mortal Wound
20.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Spectral Scythe receive 75% less healing for 4 seconds.

20.name: Kalan's Edict
20.description: Each time Skeletal Warriors deal damage, reduce the cooldown of Bone Armor and Xul's Heroic Ability by 1.5%.

tooltipMarkup.NecromancerAmplifyDamage: Increase the Root duration of Bone Prison by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,NecromancerTalentAmplifyDamage,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.  Enemies Rooted by Bone Prison lose <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NecromancerBonePrisonAmplifyDamageArmorDecrease,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus*(-1)"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NecromancerBonePrisonAmplifyDamageArmorDecrease,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerAndarielsVisage: Poison Nova heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NecromancerPoisonNovaDamage,LeechFraction[Life]*100"/>%</c> of the damage dealt and its duration is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,NecromancerTalentAndarielsVisage,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value/Behavior,NecromancerPoisonNovaDamage,Duration"Player="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerBoneArmor: Activate to gain a Shield equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,NecromancerBoneArmorShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimitVitalMaxFractionArray[Life]"Player="0"/>%</c> of Xul's maximum Health for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NecromancerBoneArmorShield,Duration"Player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerBoneArmorBacklash: When Bone Armor expires, nearby enemy Heroes take damage equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,NecromancerBoneArmorBacklashMasteryDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]"/>%</c> of their maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerBoneArmorShackler: While Bone Armor is active, nearby enemies are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,NecromancerBoneArmorMasteryShackleSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NecromancerBoneArmorMasteryShackleSlow,Duration"/></c> second. Basic Attacks against Heroes that are Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed reduce the cooldown of Bone Armor by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,NecromancerShacklerCooldownReductionModifyPlayer,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerBoneArmorShade: While Bone Armor is active, Xul evades all Basic Attacks, but increases the cooldown of Bone Armor by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,NecromancerTalentBoneArmorShade,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerBonePrison: After a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NecromancerBonePrisonCreateDelayPersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]*Effect,NecromancerBonePrisonCreateDelayPersistent,PeriodCount"/></c> second delay, deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NecromancerBonePrisonDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Root the target enemy Hero for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NecromancerBonePrisonRoot,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds.  All nearby Skeletal Warriors will fixate on the target for their duration.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerBoneSpear: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NecromancerBoneSpearDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies in a line.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerColdHandOfDeath: Increase the Slow of Frost Mages by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(-100 * Talent,NecromancerTalentColdHandOfDeath,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value)" player="0"/>%</c>.  <n/><n/>Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NecromancerSkeletalMagesColdHandOfDeathSpectralScytheTokenCount,Max"/>th</c> Spectral Scythe that hits enemy Heroes spawns a Frost Mage instead of a Skeletal Warrior at their location.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerCursedStrikes: Xul's Basic Attacks deal damage in a wide area and reduce the Attack Speed of Heroes and Summons by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,NecromancerCursedStrikesAttackSpeedSlow,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"player="0"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NecromancerCursedStrikesAttackSpeedSlow,Duration"player="0"/></c> seconds. Lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NecromancerCursedStrikesActive,Duration"player="0"/></c> seconds once triggered.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerCursedStrikesGrimScythe: Increase Xul's Basic Attack damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,NecromancerHeroWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[GrimScythe].Modifier"/>%</c>.  Each enemy hit by Cursed Strikes reduces its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,NecromancerCursedStrikesGrimScytheModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse" precision="2"/></c> second, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,NecromancerCursedStrikesGrimScytheTokenCounter,Max*Effect,NecromancerCursedStrikesGrimScytheModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerCursedStrikesRapidHarvest: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NecromancerCursedStrikesRapidHarvestAttackSpeedBuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> Attack Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NecromancerCursedStrikesRapidHarvestAttackSpeedBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds each time Cursed Strikes hits an enemy, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NecromancerCursedStrikesRapidHarvestAttackSpeedBuff,MaxStackCount*Behavior,NecromancerCursedStrikesRapidHarvestAttackSpeedBuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerDecrepifyTalent: Enemy Heroes that are damaged by Spectral Scythe or Skeletal Warriors are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,NecromancerRaiseSkeletonDecrepifySlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NecromancerRaiseSkeletonDecrepifySlow,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerEchoesOfDeathTalent: Spectral Scythe spawns <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,NecromancerTalentEchoesOfDeath,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> additional scythes next to the first after <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NecromancerSpectralScytheEchoesOfDeathDelayPersistentLeft,InitialDelay" precision="1"/></c> seconds, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="1+Effect,NecromancerSpectralScytheDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[EchoesOfDeath].Modifier*100"/>%</c> damage.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerHarvestVitality: Cursed Strikes heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NecromancerCursedStrikesDamage,LeechFraction[Life]*100"/>%</c> of the damage dealt to Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerJailors: Bone Prison spawns Skeletal Warriors. These do not count towards Xul's Raise Skeleton maximum.Quest: Spawn Skeletal Warriors.Reward: While fixating on an enemy, Skeletal Warriors gain % Movement and Attack Speed.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerMortalWound: Enemy Heroes hit by Spectral Scythe receive <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,NecromancerSpectralScytheMasteryMortalWoundDebuff,Modification.HealTakenAdditiveMultiplier[Life]"/>%</C> less healing for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NecromancerSpectralScytheMasteryMortalWoundDebuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerPoisonNova: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,NecromancerPoisonNovaInstant,CastIntroTime" precision="1"/></c> seconds, release poisonous missiles that deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NecromancerPoisonNovaDamage,Amount*10"/></c> damage to all enemies hit over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NecromancerPoisonNovaDamage,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerPoisonNovaTalent: After a short delay, release poisonous missiles that deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NecromancerPoisonNovaDamage,Amount*10"/></c> damage to all enemies hit over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NecromancerPoisonNovaDamage,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerRaiseSkeleton: When a nearby enemy Minion dies, it becomes a Skeletal Warrior with <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Unit,NecromancerRaiseSkeleton,LifeMax"/></c> Health that attacks for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NecromancerRaiseSkeletonDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and lasts up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NecromancerRaiseSkeletonTimedLife,Duration"/></c> seconds. Upon death, Skeletal Warriors deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NecromancerRaiseSkeletonCorpseExplosionTalentDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to nearby enemies.  Up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Skeletal Warriors can be active at once when spawned in this way.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerReapersTollTalent: Reduce the cooldown of Spectral Scythe by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,NecromancerTalentReapersToll,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds and its Mana cost by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,NecromancerTalentReapersToll,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"Player="0"/></c>.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerSkeletalMages: <c val="#TooltipNumbers">Vector Targeting</c></n>Summon <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NecromancerSkeletalMagesOffsetPersistent,PeriodCount" player="0"/></c> Frost Mages in a line that attack nearby enemies for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NecromancerSkeletalMagesDamage,Amount"/></c> damage a second and Slow them by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,NecromancerSkeletalMagesSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor" player="0"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NecromancerSkeletalMagesSlow,Duration"/></c> seconds. Last up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerSpectralScythe: Summon a scythe that travels to Xul after <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NecromancerSpectralScytheDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies and spawning a Skeletal Warrior when hitting enemy Heroes.  These do not count towards Xul's Raise Skeleton maximum.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerTalentKalansEdict: Each time Skeletal Warriors deal damage, reduce the cooldown of Bone Armor and Xul's Heroic Ability by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,NecromancerKalansEdictSkeletalWarriorAttackModifyCooldown,Cost[0].Fraction.Cooldown*100"Precision="2"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerTragOulsEssence: Every time a Skeletal Warrior attacks an enemy, restore <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NecromancerRaiseSkeletonTragOulsEssenceCreateHealerHealth,RechargeVitalFraction*100" precision="2"/>%</c> of Xul's maximum Health and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NecromancerRaiseSkeletonTragOulsEssenceCreateHealerMana,RechargeVitalFraction*100" precision="2"/>%</c> of his maximum Mana.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerWallOfBonesBoneArmorTalent: Increase the Shield amount of Bone Armor to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Behavior,NecromancerBoneArmorShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimitVitalMaxFractionArray[Life])+(100*Talent,NecromancerBoneArmorWallOfBonesTalent,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value)"Player="0"/>%</c> of Xul's maximum Health, and Xul gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NecromancerBoneArmorWallOfBonesSpellArmorBuff,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor for its duration.
tooltipMarkup.NecromancerWeaken: Enemy Heroes who are damaged by Cursed Strikes or Skeletal Warriors deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,NecromancerCursedStrikesWeakenDamageReduction,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]"/>%</c> less damage for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,NecromancerCursedStrikesWeakenDamageReduction,Duration"/></c> seconds.
